name: penumbra-glsl
description: Penumbra-in-Rhino IN-PROCESS GLSL studio suite (Swath C+). Drives CPig live preview through the native GLSL conduit (PenumbraPreviewBackend Glsl) instead of the deprecated out-of-process image-blit (`penumbra` suite). The CPig field renders by ray-marching directly into Rhino's GL context (native depth, camera-tracked), captured as a plain VIEWPORT screenshot (CaptureToBitmap includes the conduit's PostDrawObjects GL). Requires the Penumbra Rhino plug-in registered for auto-load + the CPig .gha (Penumbra Preview). Run ISOLATED (runMode fresh) — the GLSL frame-ready revision is process-global. v1 mode: capture (no baseline; inspect candidates + telemetry).
